title: Hornet Removal in Brownsville, Brooklyn | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Brownsville, Brooklyn. Safe, effective elimination of hornets from homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call now for $350-$550 service.
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to residents and families throughout Brownsville, Brooklyn, especially during warmer months when they build nests near homes, schools, and community spaces. Our professional hornet removal service provides safe, complete elimination of hornet nests from properties across Brownsville, from the residential blocks near Betsy Head Park to the multi-family buildings along Pitkin Avenue. Best Pest Control NYC offers fast response times and guaranteed results to protect your family and neighbors.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Brownsville for years with licensed technicians who understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's dense residential areas. We provide same-day emergency service, use family-safe methods, and offer competitive pricing with a full satisfaction guarantee for every hornet removal job.
localContext: Brownsville's mix of NYCHA developments, private homes, and community gardens creates numerous opportunities for hornets to nest in eaves, sheds, and outdoor structures. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood's building types from the residential areas around Marcus Garvey Village to the commercial corridors, ensuring we can safely access and remove nests wherever they appear.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Brownsville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal service throughout Brownsville, Brooklyn. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. We understand the urgency and prioritize rapid response to protect your family and property.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for children and pets in my Brownsville home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets once dried. Our technicians are trained in safe removal techniques that minimize risk, and we provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during the service.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, disposal of the nest, and a follow-up guarantee. Price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide free quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have hornets versus wasps or bees?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than typical wasps, often black and white or brown with yellow markings, and build large, paper-like nests usually in protected areas like eaves or trees. If you're unsure, don't approach the nest—our Brownsville technicians will identify the species during inspection and recommend the appropriate removal method for your specific situation.
